text.zh: 变分自编码器 是当前 legacy 展示中的一个 AI 历史节点。
text.en: Variational Autoencoder is an AI history milestone in the current legacy presentation.

text.zh: 变分自编码器把神经网络与概率潜变量建模结合起来。它的编码器、解码器和重参数化技巧让可扩展生成式建模可以通过梯度下降实现。
text.en: The variational autoencoder joined neural networks with probabilistic latent-variable modeling. Its encoder, decoder, and reparameterization trick made scalable generative modeling possible with gradient descent.
